description: Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon character, this pair of sneakers from marvel will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and cushioned footbed, these sneakers offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day.Product DetailsBlue and white synthetic leather upper and overlays for flexibility and durabilityPadded tongue and collar for snug comfortMidfoot Velcro straps with branding for a custom FitPadded footbed with fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortAppliqued cartoon on the lateral midfootDurable rubber outsole strategically grooved for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
